data.markdown:
DoorDash

# $0 DELIVERY FEE ON FIRST ORDER

Other fees apply

[Sign In](https://identity.doordash.com/auth?client_id=1666519390426295040&intl=en-US&layout=consumer_web&prompt=none&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.doordash.com%2Fpost-login%2F&response_type=code&scope=%2A&state=%2Fhome%7C%7Ca1b198f8-d153-44b1-8136-9ee20eb41db4) [Sign Up](https://identity.doordash.com/auth/user/signup?client_id=1666519390426295040&intl=en-US&layout=consumer_web&prompt=none&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.doordash.com%2Fpost-login%2F&response_type=code&scope=%2A&state=%2Fhome%7C%7Ca1b198f8-d153-44b1-8136-9ee20eb41db4)

Icon LoadingSign in for saved addressIcon LoadingUse current Location

![Become a Dasher](https://cdn.doordash.com/media/consumer/home/landing/new/ScootScoot.svg)

## Become a Dasher

### As a delivery driver, make money and work on your schedule. Sign up in minutes.

Start earning

Icon Loading

![Become a Merchant](https://cdn.doordash.com/media/consumer/home/landing/new/Storefront.svg)

## Become a Merchant

### Attract new customers and grow sales, starting with 0% commissions for up to 30 days.

Sign up for DoorDash

Icon Loading

![Get the best DoorDash experience](https://cdn.doordash.com/media/consumer/home/landing/new/iphone.svg)

## Get the best DoorDash experience

### Experience the best your neighborhood has to offer, all in one app.

Get the app

Icon Loading

## Everything you crave, delivered.

Your favorite local restaurantsGet a slice of pizza or the whole pie delivered, or pick up house lo mein from the Chinese takeout spot you've been meaning to try.

[Find restaurants](https://www.doordash.com/restaurants-near-me/)

## DashPass is delivery for less

Members get a $0 delivery fee on DashPass orders, 5% back on pickup orders, and so much more. Plus, it's free for 30 days.

[Get DashPass](https://www.doordash.com/dashpass/)

## Get grocery and convenience store essentials

Grocery delivery, exactly how you want it.Shop from home and fill your cart with fresh produce, frozen entrees, deli delights and more.

[Shop Groceries](https://www.doordash.com/p/grocery-delivery/)

## Convenience stores at your doorstep

Stock up on snacks, household essentials, candy, or vitamins — all delivered in under an hour.

[Shop Now](https://www.doordash.com/p/convenience-stores)

Helping you with to-dos and gifting

## Beauty essentials from top brands

Get all your beauty and self-care needs delivered at home or on-the-go

[Shop beauty](https://www.doordash.com/p/beauty-supply)

## Flowers for any occasion

Shop hand-picked and thoughtfully-arranged blooms from florists near you.

[Send Flowers](https://www.doordash.com/p/flower-delivery)

## Restock the minibar

Hosting a get-together or need or need a special cocktail ingredient? Get liquor, beer, mixers, champagne and wine delivered fast.\*

[Shop Alcohol](https://www.doordash.com/p/alcohol-delivery)

\*Must be 21+. Enjoy responsibly.

## What your pets need, and want

Finally, something cat people and dog people agree on — pet supplies delivery. Shop pet food, chew toys, and even costumes.

[Get Pet Supplies](https://www.doordash.com/p/pet-store-near-me)

Unlocking opportunity for Dashers and businesses

## Sign up to dash and get paid

Deliver with the #1 Food and Drink App in the U.S. As a delivery driver, you'll make money and work on your schedule. Sign up in minutes.

[Become a Dasher](https://dasher.doordash.com/en-us/)

## Grow your business with DoorDash

Businesses large and small partner with DoorDash to reach new customers, increase order volume, and drive more sales.

[Become a Partner](https://get.doordash.com/en-us/)

## Get more from your neighborhood

Top Cities

Top Cuisines
